notes: Plan §8 step 0.5 references datasets extraction.jsonl, ffbd.jsonl, qfd.jsonl, decision-matrix.jsonl, interfaces.jsonl — none of these exist on disk.
Actual datasets in apps/product-helper/lib/eval/datasets/ cover the v2 system-design agents only (M3-M8 + architecture-recommendation).
Baseline scores computed from pre-graded fixture-replay summary at lib/eval/datasets/_summary.json (no LLM calls; no OpenRouter spend).
Score = correct / count. partial/wrong counted as failures.
All 10 agents share an identical 18/8/4 distribution in the seeded fixture set — that is a property of the seed corpus, not a fluke.

hoq.notes: Closest match for intake qfd-agent path; M6 is the same artifact family.

interface-specs.notes: Closest match for intake interfaces-agent path.

decision-net.notes: Related but not identical: decision-matrix is the intake-side companion to M4 decision-net.

missing_datasets: extraction (intake extraction-agent — no analogue in v2 set)
ffbd-intake (intake ffbd-agent — closest is form-function but artifact shape differs)
qfd-intake (intake-specific qfd flow — only M6 hoq exists)
decision-matrix-intake (intake decision-matrix — only M4 decision-net exists)
interfaces-intake (intake-specific interfaces flow — only M7.b interface-specs exists)
nfr-runllmonly (intake NFR runLlmOnly path — closest is nfr-resynth but covers M2 resynth not intake LLM-only emission)
live_run_rationale: Running the harness in live (LANGCHAIN_API_KEY-bound) mode would burn ~$N on M datasets × N samples through OpenRouter. Per plan instructions, do not burn live credits. Fixture-replay baselines suffice for v1.
follow_up: Create new datasets for the 6 missing intake agent paths before step 4 of the main rewrite. Without baselines, those agents merge on smoke-replay only and confidence-drift gates (EC-V21-C.4) cannot fire.
